name: IdsDmClmDmClmLnProcCdModExtr

text.value: DROP TABLE IF EXISTS @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_ids_staging}.ABC_TMP_IdsDmClmDmClmLnProcCdModExtr; WITH cte_src as (select mod.clm_id, mod.clm_ln_seq_no, coalesce(cd.trgt_cd, 'UNK') as src_sys_cd, mod.clm_ln_proc_cd_mod_ordnl_cd_sk, mod.proc_cd_mod_tx from @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.clm_ln clmln join @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.w_webdm_etl_drvr extr on clmln.src_sys_cd_sk = extr.src_sys_cd_sk and clmln.clm_id = extr.clm_id join @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.clm_ln_proc_cd_mod mod on mod.clm_ln_sk = clmln.clm_ln_sk left join @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.cd_mppng cd on mod.src_sys_cd_sk = cd.cd_mppng_sk), cte_ref as (select cd_mppng_sk, coalesce(trgt_cd,'UNK') as trgt_cd, coalesce(trgt_cd_nm,'UNK') as trgt_cd_nm from @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.cd_mppng), cte_lkp as (select s.clm_id, s.clm_ln_seq_no, s.src_sys_cd, s.clm_ln_proc_cd_mod_ordnl_cd_sk, s.proc_cd_mod_tx, r.trgt_cd as clm_ln_proc_cd_mod_ordnl_cd from cte_src s left join cte_ref r on s.clm_ln_proc_cd_mod_ordnl_cd_sk = r.cd_mppng_sk), final as (select lkp.src_sys_cd, lkp.clm_id, lkp.clm_ln_seq_no, lkp.clm_ln_proc_cd_mod_ordnl_cd, lkp.proc_cd_mod_tx, @{pipeline().parameters.CurrRunCycle} as last_updt_run_cyc_no from cte_lkp lkp) select * into @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_ids_staging}.ABC_TMP_IdsDmClmDmClmLnProcCdModExtr from final

Description:
*****************************************************************************************************************************************************************************
COPYRIGHT 2005 BLUE CROSS/BLUE SHIELD OF KANSAS CITY 


JOB NAME:     IdsCLmMartClmLnProcCdModExtr

DESCRIPTION:  
  Pulls data from IDS to create claim data mart
      

INPUTS:
	IDS - CLM_LN_PROC_CD_MOD
                IDS - P_CLM_DM_EXTR
                IDS - CD_MPPNG
               

  
HASH FILES:
                hf_clmlnproc_mppng - hash file for sk lookup
               

TRANSFORMS:  
                  
                           
PROCESSING:
                  IDS - read from source, lookup all code SK values and get the natural codes
                 

OUTPUTS: 
                    updates CLM_DM_CLM_LN_PROC_CD_MOD

Developer                               Date                    Project/Altiris #       Change Description                                                       Development Project               Code Reviewer                      Date Reviewed
---------------------------------         ----------------                 -------------------      ---------------------------------------------------------                                       ----------------------------      ---------------------------------               -------------------------

Steph Goddard                 03/22/2005 -                                     Originally Programmed
BJ Luce                            08/29/2005                                       change SQL parameters to ClmMart for job sequencer
Brent Leland                     04/03/2006                                       Changed parameter for new sequencer
                                                                                                   Changed name of driver table.
Brent Leland                    04/06/2006                                        Added run cycle parameter for new table field
                                                                                                   LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_NO
Nagesh Bandi                  09/13/2013              5114                     Original Programming(Server to Parallel)                                 IntegrateWrhsDevl

Annotations:
Write CLM_DM_CLM_LN_PROC_CD_MOD Data into a Sequential file for Load Job IdsDmClmDmClmLnProcCdModLoad.
Add Defaults and Null Handling.
Job Name: 

IdsDmClmDmClmLnProcCdModExtr
Read all the Data from IDS CLM_LN_PROC_CD_MOD Table;
Code SK lookups for Denormalization

Lookup Keys:

CLM_LN_PROC_CD_MOD_ORDNL_CD_SK
